sourceSummary.oneLine: CTK Co., Ltd. test report CTK-2024-RS03-0151 reports heavy metals, flame retardants, and phthalate ester results for PET, SG, PAS SERIES mixed sample.
keyPoints: Applicant is DONG YOUNG CHEMICAL Co.,Ltd and manufacturer is JUJO CHEMICAL CO., LTD.
Date of receipt is 2024-03-07 and date(s) of test are 2024-03-08 to 2024-03-15.
Pb, Cd, Hg, Cr 6+, PBBs, PBDEs, DBP, BBP, DEHP, and DIBP are reported as N.D.
The report states it is not related to KOLAS accreditation and relevant regulation.
The tested sample was a mixed sample of PET, SG, PAS SERIES, and the color list was written by applicant's request.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated; CTK Co., Ltd. is presented as a testing laboratory, and the report says it is not related to KOLAS accreditation and relevant regulation.
No explicit revision or version for the report is stated; CTK-KQP-15-F05(00):2022.05.02 appears to be a form identifier rather than the report revision.
The report states the color list was written by applicant's request and the tested item was a mixed sample, so listed colors/models may not each have been individually tested.
